---
title: "Ideas"
listing:
  contents: "*/index.qmd"
  sort: "date desc"
  type: table
  categories: true
  fields: [date, title, categories, description]
  field-display-names:
    date: "Date"
    title: "Idea"
    categories: "Tags"
    description: "Summary"
  table-striped: true
  table-hover: true
---

Research directions, hypotheses, experiment proposals, and half-baked thoughts. 

Use `_template.qmd` as a starting point for new entries.
